mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals accelerating household demand and stronger near-term revenue expectations; higher RSAFS momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 625416.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the RSAFS 3-month momentum signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or if positive RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in no more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of FEDFUNDS above 1.00% after a low-rate period signals the start of policy tightening, raising discount rates and reducing equity valuation multiples over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.00% after being at or below 0.50% within the prior 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 0.08 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle after zero-rate policy
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the mean triggered 60-day return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 50 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE declines while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.50%, improving labor demand combines with easy policy to lift risk appetite and earnings expectations, producing positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.50% and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 4.6 and FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 0.08
regime_hint: post-shock recovery with accommodative monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform either UNRATE-only improvement or FEDFUNDS-only low-rate signals, or if triggered 20-day SPX win rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing of INDPRO below 100 signals weakening industrial output and margin pressure in cyclical sectors, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below 100 after being at or above 100 in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 100.0178 as of t-2mo
regime_hint: late-cycle slowdown or early industrial contraction
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downward crossings below 100 are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of HOUST above 1500 indicates strong housing investment and durable-goods demand, improving cyclical earnings expectations and predicting positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above 1500 after being below 1500 in the prior 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 1555.0 as of t-2mo
regime_hint: expansion with resilient household formation and construction activity
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST crossings above 1500 are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in less than 55% of cases or if the average triggered return is below the unconditional 60-day average.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll contraction combined with a rising unemployment rate identifies a labor-market break that rapidly reprices recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change below 0 and UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 148319.0 and UNRATE latest snapshot value 4.6
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration signal has no incremental negative effect versus PAYEMS alone and UNRATE alone, or if triggered 5-day SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid CPIAUCSL growth while FEDFUNDS stays below 0.50% signals policy falling behind inflation, lifting expected future tightening and valuation risk; this predicts negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 4.0% while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.50%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 276.724 and FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 0.08
regime_hint: inflation scare with accommodative nominal policy
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction does not predict lower 60-day returns than high CPIAUCSL alone, or if triggered mean 60-day SPX return is positive and statistically indistinguishable from baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Positive trailing growth in GDPC1 signals broad real-demand expansion that raises aggregate earnings expectations; higher GDPC1 growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value 19465.195 as of t-4mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth is not associated with higher subsequent 60-day SPX returns than negative GDPC1 growth, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
